group.name: Eclipse Environment Kit
Java개발도구
group.description: This package contains Eclipse Development Tools

group.name: File System Encrypt
보검
group.description: This package contains filesystem encrypt tool-bokem

group.name: LAMP
APM환경관리기
group.description: This package contains LAMP(Linux Apache MySQL PHP).

group.name: Firefox
내나라열람기3.5
group.description: This package contains firefox web browser.

group.name: SG Office
서광사무처리
group.description: This group is a collection of packages for official programs.

group.name: Development Libraries
쏘프트웨어개발서고
group.description: The packages in this group are core libraries needed to develop applications.

group.name: Development Tools
쏘프트웨어개발도구
group.description: These tools include core development tools such as automake, gcc, perl, python, ruby, and debuggers.
이것은 automake, gcc, perl, python, ruby, gdb와 같은 핵심개발도구들을 포함하고 있습니다.

group.name: Develop Editors
개발용편집프로그람
group.description: Basic support for the programming editor.
프로그람작성, 본문작성을 할수 있는 여러가지 유용한 편집프로그람들을 지원합니다.

group.name: Qt3/KDE3 SDK
Qt3/KDE3 SDK
group.description: Install these packages to develop QT and KDE graphical applications.
QT와 KDE용 GUI프로그람을 개발할수 있도록 지원합니다.

group.name: C/C++ Development Environment
통합개발환경《삼태성》3.0
group.description: Install these packages to develop SamTaeSung Development Kit.

group.name: Qt4 SDK
Qt4 SDK
group.description: Install these packages to develop QT4 graphical applications.

group.name: System Base Software
체계기반 쏘프트웨어
group.description: This is a collection of packages supporting the system base.

category.name: Applications
응용프로그람
category.description: Applications for a variety of tasks

category.name: Utility
보조프로그람
category.description: 여러가지 다양한 기능을 가진 프로그람들을 설치합니다.

category.name: Development
개발도구
category.description: Packages which provide functionality for developing and building applications.
쏘프트웨어개발에 필요한 도구들과 서고, 프로그람들을 포함합니다.
